arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Leicester City today with game not on TV
arts.sum: Spurs host Leicester on Sunday afternoon and the match will not be shown on UK TV due to broadcasting choices made by Sky Sports and TNT Sports

arts.ttl: The £165m Tottenham figure that will cause concern for Daniel Levy as announcement due
arts.sum: The report gave some early clues as to what the accounts will look like for Spurs for the 2023/24 financial year when they are released in the next few months, and also highlighted just how important it is for the club to ensure that they get themselves back into the conversation annually when it comes to a top four finish, something that seems very much beyond them this season, lying 15th and closer to the bottom three than the Champions League places. That fall was due to broadcast money falling because of a lack of Champions League football, with last year’s report taking into account the 2023/24 financial year when Spurs reached the last 16 of the competition and delivered €235m (£198.4m) in broadcast revenue.

arts.sum: Tottenham and Leicester are desperate to improve their Premier League form when they meet at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium today. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provi...

arts.ttl: £200,000-a-Week Tottenham Star 'In Talks' to Leave Club
arts.sum: On-loan Tottenham forward Timo Werner is reportedly the subject of interest from MLS outfit New York Red Bulls.

arts.ttl: Tottenham man ‘talking with’ club over shock move – Relationship could facilitate deal
arts.sum: New York Red Bulls are interested in a deal for Tottenham loanee Timo Werner and are talking to him about a potential move. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that the German striker ‘could take on a new challenge’ this month. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Leicester City in the Premier League this afternoon Ange Postecoglou’s side are struggling in the league right now and are without a win in six games. That run includes five losses, leaving Spurs 15th in the table. However, Spurs secured a morale-boosting win at Hoffenheim in the Europa League on Thursday night. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Leicester City – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham entertain Leicester City in the Premier League this afternoon with both teams in desperate need of points. Spurs overcame Hoffenheim in Germany during the week which could prove crucial in their bid to make the Europa League knockout stages. arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy has raised his voice to Leicester City players every week
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy did not deny raising his voice at his players, instead admitting it’s happened a couple of times a week since he took charge two months ago. Ruud van Nistelrooy has admitted to raising his voice at Leicester City players – but believes it is necessary to improve the standards within the team as they battle against the drop.

arts.ttl: Tottenham given Ange Postecoglou sack advice - 'they've gone backwards'
arts.sum: Tottenham go into Sunday's crunch clash with Leicester on the back of five Premier League defeats in their last six games

arts.ttl: The Tottenham transfer question Postecoglou does not ask as he drops Romero and Van de Ven hint
arts.sum: Although Tottenham's season may not have gone to plan with the team currently 15th in the Premier League table after a dismal run of form, Postecoglou stated: "I am absolutely 100 per cent confident that we are in a much better place in all areas of the club today than we were when I started" . A pivotal month for the football club with new signings needing to be finalised amid a host of injuries to key players, Spurs have only signed Antonin Kinsky so far in the winter market.
